sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8543" key="a)neuo/dwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνευόδωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8543.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">that does not prosper,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aq.</author></bibl>, Sm <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Je.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22.30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
